<insights>

- node-culler.ts implements tree pruning logic that must remain free of Preact/Express dependencies — any framework leak here would force duplicating the module
- data-files.ts centralises all .rex and .sourcevision path constants; adding new data-file paths here first prevents scattered string literals across the package
- The unit test for node-culler lives inside viewer/ test tree despite the module living in shared/ — consider moving it to tests/unit/shared/ for structural consistency
